name: Kenny Dennis
abstract: Kenny Dennis (born May 27, 1930) is a Philadelphia-born American jazz drummer. He has played on albums for Nancy Wilson, Sonny Stitt, Sonny Rollins, Johnny Griffin, Oscar Brown Jr., Charles Mingus, Billy Taylor, and Mal Waldron.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Thanksgiving Jazz at Carnegie Hall

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: Miles had come up with Kenny Dennis. Kenny Dennis is the drummer on the album called Legrand Jazz. Kenny Dennis – great, great player.
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Elvin Jones
about_quotes.evidence: I only knew one drummer that we were on that kind of terms... his name was Kenny Dennis
about_quotes.doc_title: Elvin Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
